## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Branch flow

- Day-to-day PRs target **`develop`**
- Release PRs are **`develop` → `master`** only

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the correct base branch (`develop` for features, `master` only for releases)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, conventions, or APIs changed
- [ ] Manual smoke path noted if no automated tests cover the change
